heading: About Click N Start
subheading: Bengaluru's first wheelchair taxi with an automatic hydraulic lift.

story.heading: Our Story
paragraphs: Click N Start was born from a simple observation: wheelchair users and their caregivers in Bengaluru had no dignified, safe way to travel by taxi. Every existing option required physically lifting the passenger — an exhausting, risky, and undignified experience for everyone involved.

We asked ourselves: what if boarding a taxi was as effortless as pressing a button? That question led us to build Bengaluru's first wheelchair taxi equipped with an automatic hydraulic lift — eliminating physical strain entirely.

Today, Click N Start serves hundreds of families across Bengaluru, providing reliable transport for hospital visits, airport transfers, family events, and everyday city travel. Our mission is simple: make mobility accessible, dignified, and stress-free for every wheelchair user in the city.

mission.heading: Our Mission
mission.text: To provide every wheelchair user in Bengaluru with safe, dignified, and effortless transportation — powered by technology that eliminates physical barriers.

values.title: Dignity First
values.description: Every aspect of our service is designed to preserve the dignity of our passengers. From the hydraulic lift to our trained drivers, respect comes first.

values.title: Safety Always
values.description: 4-point wheelchair locking, certified hydraulic systems, and daily vehicle inspections. We never compromise on safety.

values.title: Reliable Service
values.description: Medical appointments can't wait. We pride ourselves on punctuality and consistent availability across Bengaluru.

values.title: Hygiene Standards
values.description: Every vehicle is sanitized daily with hospital-grade disinfectants. Clean, fresh, and hygienic — every single ride.

cta.heading: Join hundreds of families who trust Click N Start
cta.subheading: Experience the difference that an automatic hydraulic lift makes.
